title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at KTC Logistics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at KTC Logistics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
KTC Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About KTC Logistics:
KTC Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KTC Logistics!
